Q&A


Q: How does the carbon fiber material of the CRBN Power ‚ÄãSeries Paddle ‚Äãcompare to other materials?

A: The‚Äå carbon ‚Å£fiber material‚Å£ used in our paddle is the optimal choice for‚Å¢ serious players. Not only does‚Äã it produce‚Äã incredible spin, but it ‚Äãalso creates a massive sweet spot for the perfect balance of power and control.

Q: ‚ÄçWhat ‚Äçis the advantage of ‚Å¢the unibody‚Äå design of the CRBN Power Series Paddle?

A: The unibody design of our‚Äå paddle stiffens the paddle, ‚Äçmaking it more responsive and durable. It also eliminates‚Å§ the weak joint at the neck where other paddles ‚Äçcan flex and ‚Äåeventually‚Å£ break.

Q: Can ‚Äçyou tell us more about the expanded sweet spot of the CRBN Power Series Paddle?

A: The redesigned internal ‚Å§composition of our paddle creates an‚Äã expanded sweet spot, helping to eliminate vibration‚Äç and improve shot ‚Äçconsistency and control.

Q: What are the dimensions and weight of‚Äå the CRBN Power Series Paddle?

A: The paddle measures 16.5‚Ä≥ in ‚Äçlength,‚Äå 7.5‚Ä≥ in width, and has a core ‚Äåthickness of 14mm. The handle ‚Å¢is 5.25‚Ä≥‚Å¢ long with a grip circumference of 4.25‚Ä≥. The weight of ‚Å£the paddle ranges from 7.8-8.1 oz.

Q: Does the CRBN Power‚Å§ Series Paddle‚Äç come ‚Å§with a cover?
